stemHtml: Under what circumstances is an intermediate holding position required?

options.a: It should be placed on a taxiway at any location other than a runway-holding position where a specific holding limit is desired.
options.b: It must be placed at any intersection of a road with a taxiway, runway, or another road.
options.c: It must be placed at any intersection of a road with a runway.
options.d: It should be provided wherever traffic density is medium or heavy.
